title: euonymus fortunei f. minimus
intro: Euonymus fortunei f. minimus, also known as Compact Fortune Euonymus, is a dwarf or compact cultivar of the evergreen Euonymus fortunei shrub native to China. This plant is prized for its small, glossy leaves and compact growth habit, making it an ideal choice for hedges or borders. The medicinal properties of Euonymus fortunei f. minimus include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, although more research is needed to fully understand its medicinal benefits. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and bark may be used to make teas, tinctures, or infusions, which are believed to promote digestive health and alleviate stress, among other potential health benefits.
